Container.Name: nas-doctor
Container.Overview:
Sleep tight knowing your server never does.
NAS Doctor is a local diagnostic and monitoring tool for your NAS. Beautiful dashboards, Prometheus metrics (90+ gauges), webhook alerts — no cloud account required. Multi-arch: amd64 + arm64.
Features: - 20+ diagnostic rules with Backblaze failure-rate thresholds (337k+ drives) - Service checks: HTTP, TCP, DNS, Ping/ICMP, SMB, NFS with per-check intervals - Tunnel monitoring: Cloudflared and Tailscale (host + Docker detection) - Proxmox VE integration: nodes, VMs, LXCs, storage, HA, tasks via API - Kubernetes integration: nodes, pods, deployments, services, PVCs, events (k8s/k3s/EKS/GKE/AKS) - 3 dashboard themes (Midnight, Clean, Ember) with draggable sections - Notification rules: 12 categories, dropdown-driven builder, one-click presets - Log forwarding: Loki, syslog, HTTP JSON - API key authentication for fleet security - Multi-server fleet monitoring with auto-pairing and visual topology - Webhook alerts: Discord, Slack, Gotify, Ntfy, generic HTTP - Export professional diagnostic reports

Config.Name: Unraid Version
Config.Description: Unraid version file (for OS update detection)

Config.Name: Host Mounts
Config.Description: Host disk mounts (for per-disk space monitoring)

Config.Name: Scan Interval
Config.Description: How often to run diagnostic scans (e.g. 30m, 1h, 6h, 24h)
